---
title: "🌍 World Development Explorer"
subtitle: "Gapminder 데이터로 보는 인류의 발전 (1952–2007)"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/anyc0414/gapMinder
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

df = pd.read_csv("../data/gapminder_clean.csv")
df_2007 = df[df["year"] == 2007].copy()
df_1952 = df[df["year"] == 1952].copy()

CONTINENT_COLORS = {
    "Africa":   "#E63946",
    "Americas": "#F4A261",
    "Asia":     "#2A9D8F",
    "Europe":   "#457B9D",
    "Oceania":  "#9B5DE5",
}
TEMPLATE = "plotly_white"
```

# 📊 Overview {orientation="columns"}

## Column {width=25%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "분석 국가"
#| icon: globe2
#| color: "#457B9D"
dict(value=f"{df['country'].nunique()}개국")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "분석 기간"
#| icon: calendar3
#| color: "#2A9D8F"
dict(value="1952 – 2007")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "기대수명 증가"
#| icon: heart-pulse
#| color: "#E63946"
gain = round(df_2007["lifeexp"].mean() - df_1952["lifeexp"].mean(), 1)
dict(value=f"+{gain}세")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "GDP 성장배율"
#| icon: graph-up-arrow
#| color: "#F4A261"
ratio = round(df_2007["gdppercap"].mean() / df_1952["gdppercap"].mean(), 1)
dict(value=f"{ratio}×")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "세계 인구 (2007)"
#| icon: people-fill
#| color: "#9B5DE5"
pop = df_2007["pop"].sum()
dict(value=f"{pop/1e9:.1f}B")
```

## Column {width=75%}

```{python}
#| title: "💡 Hans Rosling 버블차트 — GDP와 기대수명의 55년 변화 (▶ 재생 버튼을 눌러보세요)"
#| padding: 0

fig = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="gdppercap",
    y="lifeexp",
    animation_frame="year",
    animation_group="country",
    size="pop",
    color="continent",
    hover_name="country",
    hover_data={"gdppercap":":,.0f","lifeexp":":.1f","pop":":,","year":True,"continent":False},
    log_x=True,
    size_max=55,
    range_x=[200, 120000],
    range_y=[20, 90],
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"gdppercap":"1인당 GDP (달러, 로그 스케일)","lifeexp":"기대수명 (세)","continent":"대륙","pop":"인구","year":"연도"},
    template=TEMPLATE,
)
fig.update_layout(
    height=480,
    margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=10,b=10),
    legend=dict(orientation="v",x=0.01,y=0.99,bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",bordercolor="#ddd",borderwidth=1),
    font=dict(family="sans-serif"),
    xaxis=dict(showgrid=True,gridcolor="#f0f0f0"),
    yaxis=dict(showgrid=True,gridcolor="#f0f0f0"),
)
fig.layout.updatemenus[0].buttons[0].args[1]["frame"]["duration"] = 700
fig.layout.updatemenus[0].buttons[0].args[1]["transition"]["duration"] = 300
fig.show()
```

# 📈 시계열 분석 {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "대륙별 기대수명 변화 — Africa의 1990년대 정체에 주목"

trend = df.groupby(["year","continent"])["lifeexp"].mean().reset_index()
fig = px.line(trend,x="year",y="lifeexp",color="continent",markers=True,
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"year":"연도","lifeexp":"평균 기대수명 (세)","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.add_vrect(x0=1987,x1=2002,fillcolor="#E63946",opacity=0.06,layer="below",line_width=0)
fig.add_annotation(x=1994,y=52,text="🔴 HIV/AIDS<br>확산기",showarrow=False,
    font=dict(size=11,color="#E63946"),bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)")
fig.update_layout(height=280,margin=dict(l=10,r=10,t=10,b=10),
    legend=dict(orientation="h",y=-0.3),xaxis=dict(tickvals=df["year"].unique()),hovermode="x unified")
fig.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "대륙별 1인당 GDP 변화 — Asia의 급성장"

trend_gdp = df.groupby(["year","continent"])["gdppercap"].mean().reset_index()
fig = px.line(trend_gdp,x="year",y="gdppercap",color="continent",markers=True,
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"year":"연도","gdppercap":"평균 1인당 GDP ($)","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_layout(height=280,margin=dict(l=10,r=10,t=10,b=10),
    legend=dict(orientation="h",y=-0.3),xaxis=dict(tickvals=df["year"].unique()),hovermode="x unified")
fig.show()
```

## Row {height=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "연대별 대륙별 평균 기대수명"

decade = df.copy()
decade["decade"] = (decade["year"] // 10 * 10).astype(str) + "s"
decade_avg = decade.groupby(["decade","continent"])["lifeexp"].mean().reset_index()
fig = px.bar(decade_avg,x="decade",y="lifeexp",color="continent",barmode="group",
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"decade":"연대","lifeexp":"평균 기대수명 (세)","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_layout(height=250,margin=dict(l=10,r=10,t=10,b=10),legend=dict(orientation="h",y=-0.35))
fig.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "기대수명 향상 Top 10 국가 (1952→2007)"

gain_pivot = df[df["year"].isin([1952,2007])].pivot_table(
    index=["country","continent"],columns="year",values="lifeexp").reset_index()
gain_pivot.columns = ["country","continent","life_1952","life_2007"]
gain_pivot["gain"] = gain_pivot["life_2007"] - gain_pivot["life_1952"]
top10 = gain_pivot.nlargest(10,"gain").sort_values("gain")
fig = px.bar(top10,x="gain",y="country",color="continent",orientation="h",text="gain",
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"gain":"기대수명 증가 (세)","country":"","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_traces(texttemplate="+%{text:.1f}세",textposition="outside")
fig.update_layout(height=250,margin=dict(l=10,r=60,t=10,b=10),showlegend=False)
fig.show()
```

# 🌐 대륙 비교 {orientation="columns"}

## Column {width=40%}

```{python}
#| title: "2007년 대륙별 핵심 지표"

summary = df_2007.groupby("continent").agg(
    국가수=("country","nunique"),
    기대수명=("lifeexp",lambda x: round(x.mean(),1)),
    일인당GDP=("gdppercap",lambda x: int(x.mean())),
    총인구=("pop",lambda x: f"{x.sum()/1e9:.2f}B"),
).reset_index()
fig = go.Figure(data=[go.Table(
    columnwidth=[120,60,80,100,80],
    header=dict(values=["대륙","국가 수","기대수명(세)","1인당 GDP($)","총 인구"],
        fill_color="#457B9D",font=dict(color="white",size=12),align="center",height=36),
    cells=dict(values=[summary["continent"],summary["국가수"],summary["기대수명"],
        summary["일인당GDP"].map("{:,}".format),summary["총인구"]],
        fill_color=[["#f7f9fb","#edf2f7"]*5],align="center",font=dict(size=12),height=32)
)])
fig.update_layout(margin=dict(t=5,b=5,l=5,r=5),height=240)
fig.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "대륙별 기대수명 분포 (바이올린 차트)"

fig = px.violin(df,x="continent",y="lifeexp",color="continent",box=True,points=False,
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"continent":"대륙","lifeexp":"기대수명 (세)"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_layout(height=280,margin=dict(l=10,r=10,t=10,b=10),showlegend=False)
fig.show()
```

## Column {width=60%}

```{python}
#| title: "소득 분위별 기대수명 분포 — 부유할수록 오래 산다"

df_2007c = df_2007.copy()
df_2007c["gdp_group"] = pd.qcut(df_2007c["gdppercap"],q=4,
    labels=["하위 25% (저소득)","중하위 25%","중상위 25%","상위 25% (고소득)"])
fig = px.strip(df_2007c,x="gdp_group",y="lifeexp",color="continent",hover_name="country",
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,stripmode="overlay",
    labels={"gdp_group":"소득 분위","lifeexp":"기대수명 (세)","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_traces(marker=dict(size=7,opacity=0.75))
fig.update_layout(height=310,margin=dict(l=10,r=10,t=10,b=10),legend=dict(orientation="h",y=-0.2))
fig.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "변수 간 상관관계"

corr = df[["lifeexp","pop","gdppercap","year"]].corr().round(2)
labels = ["기대수명","인구","1인당 GDP","연도"]
fig = go.Figure(go.Heatmap(z=corr.values,x=labels,y=labels,colorscale="RdBu",zmid=0,
    text=corr.values,texttemplate="%{text}",textfont=dict(size=13),hoverongaps=False))
fig.update_layout(height=295,margin=dict(l=10,r=10,t=10,b=10),template=TEMPLATE)
fig.show()
```

# 🏆 국가 순위 {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height=55%}

```{python}
#| title: "2007년 기대수명 Top 15 vs Bottom 15"

top15 = df_2007.nlargest(15,"lifeexp")[["country","continent","lifeexp"]].copy()
top15["rank_type"] = "상위 15"
bot15 = df_2007.nsmallest(15,"lifeexp")[["country","continent","lifeexp"]].copy()
bot15["rank_type"] = "하위 15"
rank_df = pd.concat([top15,bot15])
fig = px.bar(rank_df.sort_values("lifeexp"),x="lifeexp",y="country",color="rank_type",
    orientation="h",text="lifeexp",
    color_discrete_map={"상위 15":"#2A9D8F","하위 15":"#E63946"},
    facet_col="rank_type",
    labels={"lifeexp":"기대수명 (세)","country":"","rank_type":""},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_traces(texttemplate="%{text:.1f}세",textposition="outside")
fig.update_layout(height=420,margin=dict(l=10,r=50,t=30,b=10),showlegend=False)
fig.for_each_annotation(lambda a: a.update(text=a.text.split("=")[-1]))
fig.show()
```

## Row {height=45%}

```{python}
#| title: "1인당 GDP Top 10 (2007년)"

top10_gdp = df_2007.nlargest(10,"gdppercap").sort_values("gdppercap")
fig = px.bar(top10_gdp,x="gdppercap",y="country",color="continent",orientation="h",text="gdppercap",
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"gdppercap":"1인당 GDP ($)","country":"","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_traces(texttemplate="$%{text:,.0f}",textposition="outside")
fig.update_layout(height=310,margin=dict(l=10,r=80,t=10,b=10),legend=dict(orientation="h",y=-0.25))
fig.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "인구 Top 10 (2007년)"

top10_pop = df_2007.nlargest(10,"pop").sort_values("pop")
fig = px.bar(top10_pop,x="pop",y="country",color="continent",orientation="h",text="pop",
    color_discrete_map=CONTINENT_COLORS,
    labels={"pop":"인구","country":"","continent":"대륙"},template=TEMPLATE)
fig.update_traces(texttemplate="%{text:,.0f}",textposition="outside")
fig.update_layout(height=310,margin=dict(l=10,r=110,t=10,b=10),showlegend=False)
fig.show()
```
